description: Cross-substrate deterministic truth pack for multi-level aggregation questions spanning failure events plus pricing, lead-time, installed-base, retrieval metadata, and site-visit surfaces. Draft starts with schema-compatible items and explicit substrate blockers.

notes.left_join_rule: When secondary substrates land, use LEFT JOINs so the same items still execute on partial coverage.
notes.current_state: As of 2026-04-19, failure_events and retrieval_metadata are confirmed. Dedicated pricing, lead-time, installed-base, and normalized site_visits substrates are not yet confirmed in data/index.
notes.authoring_slice: Initial slice seeds four draft multi-level questions and captures blocker language before corpus mining.

items.query: What were the highest failing part numbers in the NEXION system in 2024, along with unit price where available?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT f.part_number, COUNT(*) AS failure_count FROM failure_events f WHERE f.system='NEXION' AND f.event_year=2024 AND f.part_number!='' GROUP BY f.part_number ORDER BY failure_count DESC LIMIT 5
items.blocked_on_substrate: No dedicated pricing substrate is confirmed in data/index; current exact answer can only return failure counts by part.
items.why_yellow_only: The failure cohort is deterministic, but price enrichment is blocked until a normalized pricing surface lands.

items.query: Which ISTO parts failed most often from 2022 to 2025 in Djibouti, and what is the lead time for those parts?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT f.part_number, COUNT(*) AS failure_count FROM failure_events f WHERE f.system='ISTO' AND f.site_token='djibouti' AND f.event_year BETWEEN 2022 AND 2025 AND f.part_number!='' GROUP BY f.part_number ORDER BY failure_count DESC LIMIT 5
items.blocked_on_substrate: No dedicated lead-time substrate is confirmed in data/index; the join surface is still being mined from procurement evidence.
items.why_yellow_only: Lead-time enrichment is not yet deterministic even though the failure cohort is.

items.query: What are the top 5 failure-rate parts in NEXION for 2024 when ranked by failures per installed unit?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT f.part_number, COUNT(*) AS failure_count FROM failure_events f WHERE f.system='NEXION' AND f.event_year=2024 AND f.part_number!='' GROUP BY f.part_number ORDER BY failure_count DESC LIMIT 5
items.blocked_on_substrate: Installed-base denominator substrate is not yet confirmed; current deterministic output can only provide numerator rankings.
items.why_yellow_only: True failure rate remains blocked on denominator extraction.

items.query: Which sites had both the highest failure volume and a documented maintenance or site visit in 2024?
items.ground_truth_sql: SELECT f.site_token, COUNT(*) AS failure_count FROM failure_events f WHERE f.event_year=2024 AND f.site_token!='' GROUP BY f.site_token ORDER BY failure_count DESC LIMIT 5
items.blocked_on_substrate: A normalized site_visits substrate is not yet confirmed in data/index; only generic visit-related retrieval/path evidence exists today.
items.why_yellow_only: Failure ranking is deterministic, but visit corroboration is blocked until site-visit rows are normalized.
